theme: Lisbon: Europe's Rising Star for Incentive Travel

linkedin.text:
Your next incentive trip should be Lisbon. Here's why.

We've been running corporate events across Europe for 16 years. Lisbon has quietly become one of our top recommendations for 2026.

Here's what makes it work for incentive groups:

🌊 The variety: Alfama's cobblestone history, Belém's waterfront, Sintra's palaces — all within 40 minutes. Different energy every day.

🍷 The food experience: Pastel de nata, fresh Atlantic seafood, Michelin-starred restaurants at half the Paris price point.

✈️ The logistics: 3-4 hour flights from most European hubs. TAP has direct routes from 40+ cities. No jet lag, no transit hassle.

💰 The value: 30-40% more budget efficiency vs. London or Paris for comparable quality. More activities, better venues, better ROI.

🏨 The venues: Historic palaces, rooftop terraces, converted wine cellars. Every dinner feels like an event.

We produced a 65-person incentive trip for a tech firm in Lisbon last October. Feedback score: 9.6/10. Three companies from their network asked us to replicate it.

Thinking about Lisbon for your team? DM us or visit upe.co.il
📩 alon@upe.co.il

instagram.text:
Lisbon called — and your team should answer 🌊

Why we keep sending incentive groups to Portugal's capital:
✅ 40 min to palaces, beaches, history
✅ Michelin dining at Paris value
✅ 4hr flights from anywhere in Europe
✅ ROI: 30-40% more for your budget
✅ Venues that ARE the event

9.6/10 feedback from our last group there 🏆
